requirements.summary: Create a welcoming home screen with animated title, colorful mascot, and activity navigation buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Home screen displays a large, readable title with playful typography
At least three activity section buttons are visible and labeled with both icons and text
Buttons respond with a fun hover/tap animation
Layout is fully responsive and works on tablet-sized screens

file_operations.description: Create the home screen page with large animated title, mascot integration (using frontend/public/assets/generated/mascot-sun.dim_256x256.png), confetti banner decoration (using frontend/public/assets/generated/confetti-banner.dim_800x120.png), and activity navigation buttons (Letters & Numbers, Memory Match, Draw & Color). Include playful hover animations and ensure minimum 48×48px tap targets. Use rounded bubbly shapes and bright primary colors consistent with the kid-friendly theme.
Wire the Home page as the default route and set up React Router with routes for all activity sections (home, learning, memory-match, draw). Ensure navigation is icon-first with large tap targets.

Add global theme styles for kid-friendly design: bright primary colors (reds, yellows, greens, oranges), rounded bubbly shapes, large chunky typography using a rounded sans-serif font (e.g., Nunito or Fredoka), high-contrast text, and decorative accent styles for stars/confetti elements.

Extend Tailwind theme with kid-friendly color palette (bright primary colors), rounded shape utilities, and typography settings for large chunky text. Ensure minimum tap target sizes are easily achievable.

requirements.summary: Implement Number & Letter Learning section with interactive grid and animated pop-up cards
acceptanceCriteria: A grid of letter and number cards is displayed
Tapping a card shows a full-screen animated card with the letter/number rendered in large, colorful text
A 'Back' button returns the child to the grid

file_operations.description: Create the learning section page with a responsive grid displaying letters A–Z and numbers 1–20 as tappable cards. Each card shows an icon and label. Include confetti decoration accents. Ensure minimum 48×48px tap targets and bright colors.
Create a reusable card component for letters and numbers with tap/click handler. Include hover animations and visual feedback. Use rounded shapes and bright colors.

Create a full-screen animated pop-up modal that displays the selected letter or number in large, colorful, animated text. Include a large 'Back' button with icon. Use playful entrance/exit animations and star/confetti accents.
Add route for the Learning page at /learning and ensure it's wired to navigation from the Home page.

requirements.summary: Implement Memory Match mini-game with emoji/animal cards, flip animations, match tracking, and best score display
acceptanceCriteria: A 4×4 grid of face-down cards is displayed
Clicking a card flips it with an animation to reveal its image
Two revealed non-matching cards flip back after a short delay
Matching pairs remain face-up and are highlighted
A match counter updates after each successful pair
A congratulatory message appears when all pairs are matched

file_operations.description: Create the Memory Match game page with a 4×4 grid of face-down cards using animal images from frontend/public/assets/generated/animal-cards.dim_512x256.png (extract individual animals: cat, dog, frog, rabbit, bear, duck, owl, fox). Implement game logic for card flipping, matching pairs, move counter, and congratulatory message on completion. Display the best score retrieved from backend using getBestScore(). Include a 'New Game' button. Use bright colors, rounded shapes, and star/confetti accents.
Create a reusable memory card component with flip animation, face-down/face-up states, and highlighting for matched pairs. Use CSS transforms for smooth flip animations.

Create a custom hook to manage Memory Match game state: card shuffle, flip logic, match detection, move counter, win condition check, and backend score persistence using recordScore() and getBestScore() methods from backend interface.
Add route for the MemoryMatch page at /memory-match and ensure it's wired to navigation from the Home page.

requirements.summary: Implement Color & Draw canvas with color palette, drawing support for mouse and touch, and clear button
acceptanceCriteria: A full-width drawing canvas is rendered
A color palette with at least 8 bright colors is displayed
Mouse drag and touch drag both draw on the canvas
A 'Clear' button wipes the canvas
Brush strokes are smooth and rounded

file_operations.description: Create the drawing canvas page with a full-width HTML5 canvas element, color palette with 8+ bright colors, mouse and touch drawing support with smooth rounded brush strokes, and a large 'Clear' button with icon. Include confetti decoration accents and ensure responsive layout.
Create a color palette component displaying at least 8 bright colors as large tappable buttons (minimum 48×48px). Highlight the selected color with visual feedback. Use rounded bubbly shapes.

Create a custom hook to manage canvas drawing state: mouse/touch event handlers, color selection, brush stroke rendering with smooth rounded lines, and canvas clear functionality. Handle both mouse and touch input seamlessly.
Add route for the Draw page at /draw and ensure it's wired to navigation from the Home page.

requirements.summary: Apply consistent joyful visual theme with bright colors, rounded shapes, chunky typography, and decorative accents across entire app
acceptanceCriteria: All screens use the same color palette and typeface
All interactive elements have a minimum tap target of 48×48px
No small or hard-to-read text appears anywhere in the UI
Decorative accents (stars, confetti shapes) appear consistently in section headers

file_operations.description: Create a shared layout component that wraps all pages with consistent header (including mascot and confetti decorations using generated images), navigation bar with large icon-first buttons (minimum 48×48px tap targets), and footer. Apply consistent spacing, rounded shapes, and bright colors throughout.

Create a reusable component for decorative star/confetti accents to be used in section headers across all pages. Use the confetti banner from frontend/public/assets/generated/confetti-banner.dim_800x120.png and additional CSS-based star shapes.
Wrap all routes with the Layout component to ensure consistent visual theme and navigation across all pages.
Add link tag to import a rounded sans-serif Google Font (e.g., Nunito or Fredoka) for chunky kid-friendly typography throughout the app.
